artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found an institutional Universidad de Sevilla/Biblioteca guide and an official Decálogo PDF. Claims were limited to the Decálogo PDF and BUS guide pages; official-domain research and personal faculty pages were rejected as non-institutional or non-policy evidence.

artifacts.claimText: Universidad de Sevilla's Decálogo for generative AI in teaching frames generative AI as a high-potential tool and recommends fostering its use across the university community.

citation.citationTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla

artifacts.claimText: The Universidad de Sevilla Decálogo says AI users should be transparent about where and how they use AI, including details on the tool, prompt, and data provided.

citation.citationTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Universidad de Sevilla Decálogo warns that free AI tools may use submitted data for learning and improvement, and says personal or confidential data should only be used with corporate tools that guarantee data protection and privacy.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Dado el potencial de la IA generativa se hace imprescindible fomentar su uso por todos los miembros de nuestra CU, en el convencimiento de que el resto de los actores de la sociedad la usan, y con el objetivo de no quedar rezagados de los avances que esta tecnología puede propiciar.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Decálogo recommends fostering generative AI use by all members of the university community.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Es necesario ser transparente en el uso de la IA. Úsala como una fuente más de documentación e inspiración. Indica, en cada momento, donde y como la has usado, dando detalles sobre la herramienta empleada, el “prompt” y los datos proporcionados.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Decálogo calls for transparent AI use, including the tool, prompt, and data provided.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Por norma general, las herramientas de uso libre pueden usar esos datos en los procesos de aprendizaje y mejora. Si vas a usar datos personales o confidenciales, solo debes usar herramientas corporativas que garanticen la protección y privacidad de los datos, asegurándote con ello que no serán usado para el aprendizaje del sistema.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Decálogo warns about data use by free AI tools and says personal or confidential data should use corporate tools that protect privacy.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.citationTitle: Decálogo del uso de la Inteligencia Artificial Generativa en docencia de la Universidad de Sevilla

artifacts.sourceTitle: Uso ético - Inteligencia artificial en el ámbito académico
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Atender siempre a las recomendaciones del profesorado, respetando los límites y criterios de evaluación que este marque en el uso de las IAs en su asignatura. Citar y declarar el uso de inteligencia artificial. Evitar el plagio de información: para respetar los derechos de autor y la integridad académica es necesario citar y parafrasear siempre, evitando así el plagio accidental o erróneo.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The BUS ethical-use guide tells students to follow instructor limits, cite and declare AI use, and avoid plagiarism.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Declaración de Uso de IA - Inteligencia artificial en el ámbito académico
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Se sugiere añadir un anexo al final de tu trabajo (tras la bibliografía) siguiendo el marco AID (Artificial Intelligence Disclosure). A continuación, te ofrecemos una plantilla base y los puntos clave que debes cubrir: Herramienta(s), Propósito, Prompts (Instrucciones), Integración, Verificación, Ética y Límites.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The BUS guide suggests an AI-use appendix covering tool, purpose, prompts, integration, verification, and ethical limits.

artifacts.notes: Narrow candidate claim is directly supported by the official Decálogo recommendation to foster generative AI use across the university community.
Narrow candidate claim preserves the source's transparency guidance without converting it into a binding disciplinary rule.
Privacy candidate claim is limited to the Decálogo's warning on free tools and its corporate-tool recommendation for personal or confidential data.
Academic-integrity candidate claim is supported by the BUS ethical-use page and remains scoped to guidance for academic work.
AI-disclosure claim is limited to the BUS page's suggested appendix/template and does not assert a mandatory university-wide rule.

artifacts.title: Universidad de Sevilla AI Policy Staged Crawl
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl found official Universidad de Sevilla/BUS guidance: an official Decálogo PDF for generative AI in teaching and BUS guide pages on ethical AI use and AI-use disclosure. The bundle stages five narrow agent-reviewed candidate claims, rejects non-policy official-domain research/personal pages, and does not publish canonical claims.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The strongest source is guidance/recommendation material rather than a formal disciplinary regulation. Claims are staged as candidates only.
Official-domain research articles and personal faculty pages were rejected as insufficient for university-wide policy claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
